title: CTOV - All Bark, All Bites compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and All Bark, All Bite mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and All Bark, All Bites. You will find some kennels in Pillager outposts. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**All Bark, All Bites mod**

All Bark, All Bites mod can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/all-bark-all-bite)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
